prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/324-sheet.numbers in Numbers. Sheet 1 has a table with 'Category' in column A and 'Amount' in column B. Create a new sheet (called 'Summary' or similar) that contains a table totalling Amount per Category. You may use a pivot table (Organize > Pivot), or write category names manually with SUMIF formulas. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'numbers pivot_aggregate ~/Desktop/kinbench/324-sheet.numbers "Sheet 1" A1:B100'. Save. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/324-pivot-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
